methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.AddFieldOptions.__init__
documentation:
The options to add a field to an Intermediate Type.

```
param field

The resolvable field to add. This option must be configured for Object, Interface, Input and Union Types. Default: - no IField

param field_name

The name of the field. This option must be configured for Object, Interface, Input and Enum Types. Default: - no fieldName
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.AddFieldOptions.field
documentation:
The resolvable field to add.

This option must be configured for Object, Interface,
Input and Union Types.

:default: - no IField

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.AddFieldOptions.field_name
documentation:
The name of the field.

This option must be configured for Object, Interface,
Input and Enum Types.

:default: - no fieldName

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.BaseTypeOptions.__init__
documentation:
Base options for GraphQL Types.

```
param is_list

property determining if this attribute is a list i.e. if true, attribute would be [Type]. Default: - false

param is_required

property determining if this attribute is non-nullable i.e. if true, attribute would be Type! Default: - false

param is_required_list

property determining if this attribute is a non-nullable list i.e. if true, attribute would be [ Type ]! or if isRequired true, attribe would be [ Type! ]! Default: - false

option

isRequiredList - is this attribute a non-nullable list
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.BaseTypeOptions.is_list
documentation:
property determining if this attribute is a list i.e. if true, attribute would be [Type].

:default: - false

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.BaseTypeOptions.is_required
documentation:
property determining if this attribute is non-nullable i.e. if true, attribute would be Type!

:default: - false

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.BaseTypeOptions.is_required_list
documentation:
property determining if this attribute is a non-nullable list i.e. if true, attribute would be [ Type ]! or if isRequired true, attribe would be [ Type! ]!

:default: - false

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.CodeFirstSchema.add_mutation
documentation:
Add a mutation field to the schema's Mutation. CDK will create an Object Type called 'Mutation'. For example,.

type Mutation {
fieldName: Field.returnType
}

```
param field_name

the name of the Mutation.

param field

the resolvable field to for this Mutation.
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.CodeFirstSchema.add_query
documentation:
Add a query field to the schema's Query. CDK will create an Object Type called 'Query'. For example,.

type Query {
fieldName: Field.returnType
}

```
param field_name

the name of the query.

param field

the resolvable field to for this query.
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.CodeFirstSchema.add_subscription
documentation:
Add a subscription field to the schema's Subscription. CDK will create an Object Type called 'Subscription'. For example,.

type Subscription {
fieldName: Field.returnType
}

```
param field_name

the name of the Subscription.

param field

the resolvable field to for this Subscription.
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.CodeFirstSchema.add_to_schema
documentation:
Escape hatch to add to Schema as desired.

Will always result
in a newline.

```
param addition

the addition to add to schema.

param delimiter

the delimiter between schema and addition.

default

source:9: (INFO/1) Unexpected possible title overline or transition.
Treating it as ordinary text because it's so short.

''
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.CodeFirstSchema.add_type
documentation:
Add type to the schema.

```
param type

the intermediate type to add to the schema.
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.CodeFirstSchema.bind
documentation:
Called when the GraphQL Api is initialized to allow this object to bind to the stack.

```
param api

The binding GraphQL Api.
```

documentation: The definition for this schema.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.FieldOptions.__init__
documentation:
Properties for configuring a field.

```
param return_type

The return type for this field.

param args

The arguments for this field. i.e. type Example (first: String second: String) {} - where 'first' and 'second' are key values for args and 'String' is the GraphqlType Default: - no arguments

param directives

the directives for this field. Default: - no directives

options

```

args - the variables and types that define the arguments

i.e. { string: GraphqlType, string: GraphqlType }

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.FieldOptions.return_type
documentation: The return type for this field.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.FieldOptions.args
documentation:
The arguments for this field.

i.e. type Example (first: String second: String) {}

- where 'first' and 'second' are key values for args
  and 'String' is the GraphqlType

:default: - no arguments

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.FieldOptions.directives
documentation:
the directives for this field.

:default: - no directives

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.GraphqlTypeOptions.__init__
documentation:
Options for GraphQL Types.

```
param is_list

property determining if this attribute is a list i.e. if true, attribute would be [Type]. Default: - false

param is_required

property determining if this attribute is non-nullable i.e. if true, attribute would be Type! Default: - false

param is_required_list

property determining if this attribute is a non-nullable list i.e. if true, attribute would be [ Type ]! or if isRequired true, attribe would be [ Type! ]! Default: - false

param intermediate_type

the intermediate type linked to this attribute. Default: - no intermediate type

option

objectType - the object type linked to this attribute
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.GraphqlTypeOptions.is_list
documentation:

:default: - false

classes.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.ISourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProvider

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.ISourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProvider.service_token
documentation: Service token which is used for identifying the handler used for the merge operation custom resource.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.ISourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProvider.associate_source_api_association
documentation:
This function associates a source api association with the provider.

This method can be used for adding permissions to merge a specific source api association to the custom resource provider.

```
param source_api_association

The association to associate.
```
This interface for the provider of the custom resource that will be used to initiate a merge operation during Cloudformation update.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils._ISourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProviderProxy.associate_source_api_association

```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.InputType.add_field
documentation:
Add a field to this Input Type.

Input Types must have both fieldName and field options.

```
param field

The resolvable field to add. This option must be configured for Object, Interface, Input and Union Types. Default: - no IField

param field_name

classes.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperation

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperation.__init__
documentation:
---
param always_merge_on_stack_update: 'Flag indicating whether the source api should
  be merged on every CFN update or not. If set to true and there are no changes to
  the source API, this will result in a no-op merge operation. Default: False'
param id: '-'
param merge_operation_provider: The merge operation provider construct which is responsible
  for configuring the Lambda resource that will be invoked during Cloudformation update.
param scope: '-'
param source_api_association: The source api association resource which will be merged.
param version_identifier: 'The version identifier for the schema merge operation.
  Any change to the version identifier will trigger a merge on the next update. Use
  the version identifier property to control when the source API metadata is merged.
  Default: null'
---

The SourceApiAssociationMergeOperation triggers a merge of a source API during a Cloudformation stack update.

This can be used to propagate changes from the source API to the Merged API when the association is using type MANUAL_MERGE.
If the merge operation fails, it will fail the Cloudformation update and rollback the stack.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for SourceApiAssociationMergeOperation which handles triggering a merge operation as a custom resource during a Cloudformation stack update.

```
param source_api_association

The source api association resource which will be merged.

param always_merge_on_stack_update

Flag indicating whether the source api should be merged on every CFN update or not. If set to true and there are no changes to the source API, this will result in a no-op merge operation. Default: False

param merge_operation_provider

The merge operation provider construct which is responsible for configuring the Lambda resource that will be invoked during Cloudformation update.

param version_identifier

The version identifier for the schema merge operation. Any change to the version identifier will trigger a merge on the next update. Use the version identifier property to control when the source API metadata is merged. Default: null
```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProps.source_api_association
documentation: The source api association resource which will be merged.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProps.always_merge_on_stack_update
documentation:
Flag indicating whether the source api should be merged on every CFN update or not.

If set to true and there are no changes to the source API, this will result in a no-op merge operation.

:default: False

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProps.merge_operation_provider
documentation: The merge operation provider construct which is responsible for configuring the Lambda resource that will be invoked during Cloudformation update.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProps.version_identifier
documentation:
The version identifier for the schema merge operation.

Any change to the version identifier will trigger a merge on the next
update. Use the version identifier property to control when the source API metadata is merged.

:default: null

documentation:
---
param id: '-'
param polling_interval: 'Time between calls to the polling Lambda function which determines
  whether the merge operation is finished or not. Default: Duration.seconds(5)'
param scope: '-'
param total_timeout: 'Total timeout in waiting for the source api association merge
  operation to complete. Default: Duration.minutes(15)'
---

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.SourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProvider.associate_source_api_association

This method can be used for adding permissions to merge a specific source api association to the custom resource provider.

documentation: Service token for the resource provider.

documentation: The lambda function response for ensuring that the merge operation finished.
SourceApiAssociationMergeProvider class is responsible for constructing the custom resource that will be used for initiating the source API merge during a Cloudformation update.

Properties for SourceApiAssociationMergeOperationProvider.

```

classes.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.ID
documentation:
`ID` scalar type is a unique identifier. `ID` type is serialized similar to `String`.

Often used as a key for a cache and not intended to be human-readable.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.STRING
documentation: ``String`` scalar type is a free-form human-readable text.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.INT
documentation: ``Int`` scalar type is a signed non-fractional numerical value.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.FLOAT
documentation: ``Float`` scalar type is a signed double-precision fractional value.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.BOOLEAN
documentation: ``Boolean`` scalar type is a boolean value: true or false.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_DATE
documentation:
`AWSDate` scalar type represents a valid extended `ISO 8601 Date` string.

In other words, accepts date strings in the form of `YYYY-MM-DD`. It accepts time zone offsets.

```
see

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Calendar_dates
```

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_TIME
documentation:
`AWSTime` scalar type represents a valid extended `ISO 8601 Time` string.

In other words, accepts date strings in the form of `hh:mm:ss.sss`. It accepts time zone offsets.

```
see

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Times
```

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_DATE_TIME
documentation:
`AWSDateTime` scalar type represents a valid extended `ISO 8601 DateTime` string.

In other words, accepts date strings in the form of `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ`. It accepts time zone offsets.

```
see

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Combined_date_and_time_representations
```

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_TIMESTAMP
documentation:
`AWSTimestamp` scalar type represents the number of seconds since `1970-01-01T00:00Z`.

Timestamps are serialized and deserialized as numbers.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_EMAIL
documentation: `AWSEmail` scalar type represents an email address string (<mailto:i.e.``username@example>.com\`\`).

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_JSON
documentation: ``AWSJson`` scalar type represents a JSON string.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_URL
documentation:
``AWSURL`` scalar type represetns a valid URL string.

URLs wihtout schemes or contain double slashes are considered invalid.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_PHONE
documentation:
``AWSPhone`` scalar type represents a valid phone number. Phone numbers maybe be whitespace delimited or hyphenated.

The number can specify a country code at the beginning, but is not required for US phone numbers.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.AWS_IP_ADDRESS
documentation: `AWSIPAddress` scalar type respresents a valid `IPv4` of `IPv6` address string.

class_variables.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Type.INTERMEDIATE
documentation: Type used for Intermediate Types (i.e. an interface or an object type).
Enum containing the Types that can be used to define ObjectTypes.

documentation: the authorization modes supported by this intermediate type.

Union Types are abstract types that are similar to Interface Types, but they cannot to specify any common fields between types.

Note that fields of a union type need to be object types. In other words,
you can't create a union type out of interfaces, other unions, or inputs.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.GraphqlType.type
documentation: the type of attribute.

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.GraphqlType.intermediate_type
documentation:
the intermediate type linked to this attribute (i.e. an interface or an object).

:default: - no intermediate type

The GraphQL Types in AppSync's GraphQL.

GraphQL Types are the
building blocks for object types, queries, mutations, etc. They are
types like String, Int, Id or even Object Types you create.

i.e. `String`, `String!`, `[String]`, `[String!]`, `[String]!`

GraphQL Types are used to define the entirety of schema.

classes.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Field

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Field.__init__
documentation:
---
param args: 'The arguments for this field. i.e. type Example (first: String second:
  String) {} - where ''first'' and ''second'' are key values for args and ''String''
  is the GraphqlType Default: - no arguments'
param directives: 'the directives for this field. Default: - no directives'
param return_type: The return type for this field.
---

```

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.Field.field_options
documentation:
The options for this field.

:default: - no arguments
Fields build upon Graphql Types and provide typing and arguments.

classes.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.ResolvableField

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.ResolvableField.__init__
documentation:
---
param args: 'The arguments for this field. i.e. type Example (first: String second:
  String) {} - where ''first'' and ''second'' are key values for args and ''String''
  is the GraphqlType Default: - no arguments'
param caching_config: 'The caching configuration for this resolver. Default: - No
  caching configuration'
param code: 'The function code. Default: - no code is used'
param data_source: 'The data source creating linked to this resolvable field. Default:
  - no data source'
param directives: 'the directives for this field. Default: - no directives'
param max_batch_size: 'The maximum number of elements per batch, when using batch
  invoke. Default: - No max batch size'
param pipeline_config: 'configuration of the pipeline resolver. Default: - no pipeline
  resolver configuration An empty array | undefined sets resolver to be of kind, unit'
param request_mapping_template: 'The request mapping template for this resolver. Default:
  - No mapping template'
param response_mapping_template: 'The response mapping template for this resolver.
  Default: - No mapping template'
param return_type: The return type for this field.
param runtime: 'The functions runtime. Default: - no function runtime, VTL mapping
  templates used'
---

methods.name: awscdk.appsync_utils.ResolvableField.field_options
documentation:
The options to make this field resolvable.

:default: - not a resolvable field
Resolvable Fields build upon Graphql Types and provide fields that can resolve into operations on a data source.
